modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use an even and factual tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be no spelling errors and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Need guidance on tools for creating an AI Agent.

full_description_text:  
User wants to create a custom AI Agent.  
They are unsure which tool to utilize for this purpose.  
The relevant tools include Microsoft Copilot and Azure AI Foundy.  
Clarification on the appropriate tool is needed.
